subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! Thy letter was received, and profound sorrow was felt at the ascension of the esteemed brother of purity, for [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نامه شما رسید و از صعود حضرت اخوان صفا نهایت تاثر حاصل گردید زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @eulogies; reminiscences
